name: CoinPay Wallet
summary: Non-custodial multi-chain wallet with one-click x402 payments.
description:
CoinPay Wallet is a non-custodial, cross-browser (MV3) wallet for the CoinPay multi-chain platform.

- Create or import a BIP-39 wallet; the seed is encrypted at rest (WebCrypto AES-256-GCM + PBKDF2) and never leaves your device.
- Derives addresses for BTC, BCH, ETH, POL and SOL (with USDC on ETH/POL/SOL), matching the CoinPay web wallet.
- Backup-confirmation gate before the wallet is usable; configurable idle auto-lock.

This Phase 1 release ships wallet lifecycle + receive/address views. Send and one-click x402 (HTTP 402) payment approval land in subsequent updates. Source: https://github.com/profullstack/coinpayportal/tree/master/packages/extension
